kill_fact: No kill_fact found. Every load-bearing number verifies against the Q1-2026 10-Q (period end 3/31/2026): cash+securities $2,536.9M ($1,594.1M cash + $614.5M current + $328.3M non-current marketable securities) = the claimed $2.5B; 173,867,839 actual shares outstanding (~174M, +~28% YoY confirmed); Q1 net loss $33.1M, operating loss $51.2M; $1.18B ATM completed in Q1 (~12.4M shares at avg ~$96.95). Pre-revenue, $0 top line, ~$10.6B cap, spot ~$61 — all confirmed. The DOE Reactor-Pilot July-4-2026 criticality target and late-2027-to-early-2028 first-power date verify (Trump EO-driven, OTA signed; first-of-a-kind slip risk is real). The thesis is a fairly-priced, two-sided pre-revenue option — the B/WATCH-for-capitulation verdict at conviction 3 survives an adversarial attack and is, if anything, conservative.
corrections: LOAD-BEARING CORRECTION to the bear case: the debate repeatedly frames the entire ~14 GW pipeline (incl. Meta) as 'entirely NON-BINDING LOIs... no payment obligation.' That is WRONG for the Meta leg. Per Oklo's own newsroom release and the 10-Q, the Oklo-Meta 1.2 GW Pike County, Ohio agreement (signed Jan 5, 2026) is a binding PREPAYMENT AGREEMENT under which Meta PREPAYS for power and FUNDS deployment (Oklo uses the funding to secure nuclear fuel and advance Phase 1) — materially more committed than an LOI, and it carries a payment mechanism the bear thesis denies exists. This correction cuts AGAINST the bear. (The Switch 12 GW DOES remain genuinely non-binding — confirmed 'nonbinding framework' — and Meta is multi-sourcing across Oklo/Vistra/TerraPower, so concentration/conversion risk on the other GW stands.) Second minor correction: Meta first phase is targeted 'as early as 2030' (full 1.2 GW by 2034), separate from and later than the late-2027 INL first-power date — the bull's near-term cash-flow timing leans on INL, not Meta.
evidence: Oklo Inc. Form 10-Q for period ended 2026-03-31 (SEC EDGAR, accession 000162828026034095): cash & equivalents $1,594.1M, marketable securities $614.5M current + $328.3M non-current (total cash+securities $2,536.9M), net loss $33.1M, operating loss $51.2M, 173,867,839 shares outstanding, $1.18B 2025-ATM completed in Q1 at avg ~$96.95/sh — https://www.sec.gov/Archives/edgar/data/0001849056/000162828026034095/oklo-20260331.htm

Oklo newsroom, 2026-01-05: 'Oklo, Meta Announce Agreement in Support of 1.2 GW Nuclear Energy Development in Southern Ohio' — a binding PREPAYMENT agreement (Meta prepays for power + funds deployment), Pike County OH, first phase as early as 2030, full 1.2 GW by 2034 — https://oklo.com/newsroom/news-details/2026/Oklo-Meta-Announce-Agreement-in-Support-of-1-2-GW-Nuclear-Energy-Development-in-Southern-Ohio/default.aspx

Utility Dive, Oklo-Switch 12 GW Master Power Agreement is a NONBINDING framework; Meta inks up to 6.6 GW across Oklo/Vistra/TerraPower (multi-sourcing confirmed) — https://www.utilitydive.com/news/oklo-aurora-smr-advanced-nuclear-reactor-supply-agreement-data-center-developer-switch/735933/

World Nuclear News / Utility Dive (2025): DOE Reactor Pilot Program targets criticality in 3 test reactors by July 4 2026 (Trump EO-driven, Aurora-INL among initial selections, OTA signed); Oklo 75-MW Aurora design, first commercial deployment late-2027 to early-2028 at INL — https://www.utilitydive.com/news/oklo-75-mw-reactor-design-smr-nuclear/743578/
